$comment: WORKSPACE_DIR     — absolute path to the workspace directory
CLAUDE_MODEL      — override the model (e.g. claude-sonnet-5, claude-opus-4-8)
Do not store credentials in this file.

agentCard.name: Claude Workspace Engineer
agentCard.description: A repository-scoped software engineering agent backed by Claude Code.

skills.name: Workspace Engineering
skills.description: Inspect, modify, and validate code within the configured workspace.

claude.systemPromptAppend: Operate only within the configured workspace. Make the smallest safe change. Run relevant tests after edits. Never reveal credentials, environment variables, or internal tool configuration.
